hide-ui.name: Hide Floating Bar
hide-ui.hint: If enabled, the floating party resources bar is hidden.

ui-opacity.name: UI Opacity
ui-opacity.hint: The transparency of the floating resources bar.

ui-scale.name: UI Scale
ui-scale.hint: The size of the floating resources bar.

ui-offset-x.name: Horizontal Offset (X)
ui-offset-x.hint: Horizontal position adjustment (in pixels) from the center.

ui-offset-y.name: Vertical Offset (Y)
ui-offset-y.hint: Vertical position adjustment (in pixels) from the bottom.

container-actor-id.name: Party Container
container-actor-id.hint: The name or ID of the shared party container (can be a Loot Actor, a Container Item, or a Token on the scene). If found, the backpack button opens its sheet; otherwise, it opens the resource viewer.

config.title: yugen-party-resources
config.icon-placeholder: Icon class or image path (e.g., fas fa-coins)
